prompt: Multi-list todo app. A list creator sees only their own lists and can invite collaborators per list; invited collaborators see only the lists shared with them. Persist lists, items, and per-list membership in Fireproof.
Web Audio synthesizer with a playable keyboard and an ADSR envelope (attack/decay/sustain/release sliders) that shapes each note. No external audio libraries.

Recipe to smart shopping list. Enter a recipe; use callAI with a JSON schema to extract ingredients into structured docs; tapping an item toggles 'have it' with optimistic Fireproof writes and a per-row saving cue; a button uses callAI to suggest substitutions.
